title: Project AIR - General Study Protocol
author: van Leeuwen, Kicky G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Project AIR is a research initiative to objectively validate commercially available artificial intelligence based software in radiology. Products are compared head-to-head by applying them on the same, hidden dataset. Radiologist read (a subset of) the same set compare performance.  

 This document describes the general Project AIR framework. For each use case addressed, separate study protocols are developed. 

 Currently the following study protocols exist: 

 - Project AIR - Lung Nodule Detection X-ray Study Protocol: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7573186 

 - Project AIR - Project AIR - Bone Age Prediction Hand X-ray Study Protocol: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7573224
